studies.type: XR Lumbar Spine 3 Views (AP, LAT, SPOT)
studies.impression: Moderate degenerative disc disease at L1-2 and L2-3 with a limbus vertebra at L3.

findings.vertebral_bodies: Intact. Moderate anterior endplate spurring and degenerative vertebral body sclerosis at L1-L2 anteriorly. Limbus vertebra at L3 with chronically fragmented appearance of the anterior superior corner.
findings.disc_spaces: Moderate disc height loss at L1-2 and L2-3.

l2.label: Moderate Disc Disease — height loss L1-2/L2-3

l3.label: Limbus Vertebra — chronically fragmented anterior superior corner

impression: Negative CT scan for acute pathology — no renal obstructive uropathy change
Fairly pronounced foraminal narrowing and impingement of the exiting L5 nerve root on the left (axial imaging 295 series 4) — correlate as potential source of left flank pain

findings.liver: Heterogeneous fatty infiltrative change throughout the liver (hepatic steatosis)
findings.right_kidney: Small 2mm stone in lower pole. No renal obstructive uropathy.
findings.bowel: Diverticuli without diverticulitis. No acute colonic pathology.
findings.vessels: Mild calcified aorta. No aneurysmal change.

musculoskeletal.L1_L2: Advanced disc space narrowing and degenerative changes
musculoskeletal.L2_L3: Prominent but less pronounced disc degenerative changes
musculoskeletal.L3: Limbus vertebral body defect along the superior endplate
musculoskeletal.L5_S1: Moderate foraminal narrowing on the LEFT with impingement of the exiting L5 nerve root — moderately severe degree (image 295 series 4)

l5.label: L5 Nerve Root Impingement — moderately severe, left side

impression: No acute abnormality in the abdomen or pelvis

findings.hepatobiliary: Redemonstrated diffuse hepatic steatosis with fatty spring along gallbladder fossa. Unremarkable gallbladder and biliary tree.
findings.kidneys: Enhance symmetrically. Stable hypodense renal lesions, likely benign cysts. No hydronephrosis or obstructing urolithiasis.
findings.gi: Normal caliber bowel. Few colonic diverticula, no acute diverticulitis. Normal appendix. No pneumoperitoneum or free fluid.
findings.vessels: Mild aortic atherosclerotic changes — premature for age
findings.bones_soft_tissue: Redemonstrated multilevel degenerative changes in the lumbar spine. Small fat-containing umbilical hernia.
findings.note: No change from Feb 12 — all lumbar findings chronic and stable
